questions.text: What is the main purpose of a trustline on Stellar?
options: To generate a new keypair automatically

questions.text: Which Stellar component is most commonly used by apps to submit transactions and query account data?
Why should you practice transactions on a test network first?
options: You can practice without risking real funds
You don’t need to sign transactions on test networks
Fees are always zero on test networks

questions.text: Which statement about Soroban is accurate?
options: Soroban contracts can read files from the server disk
Soroban contracts are deterministic programs that run against ledger state
Soroban is required to create trustlines

questions.text: A Stellar transaction is ordered and protected from replay primarily by the _____?
